With Your Dreams

From solo founders to enterprise teams, we've got the perfect plan to supercharge your startup journey with AI-powered tools.

Free

Startups & Small Teams

Perfect for getting started

Free
  • Basic surveys (up to 5 active)
  • 100 responses/month
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
  • 1 AI Sarthi query/day
  • Up to 10 users

Starter

Growing Startups

10-50 employees

$49/month
  • Unlimited surveys
  • 1,000 responses/month
  • Advanced analytics
  • Team collaboration (basic)
  • Task management (50 tasks)
  • 50 AI Sarthi queries/month
  • Priority email support
  • Custom branding
MOST POPULAR

Professional

Mid-size Companies

50-200 employees

$199/month
  • Everything in Starter
  • Unlimited responses
  • Advanced team collaboration
  • Unlimited task management
  • 500 AI Sarthi queries/month
  • All AI Sarthi tools
  • 2 Founder Academy courses/month
  • Priority chat support
  • Custom integrations
ENTERPRISE

Large Organizations

200+ employees

  • Unlimited AI Sarthi queries

  • Custom integrations
  • SSO & advanced security

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I change plans later?

Absolutely! Upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes take effect immediately with prorated billing.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for Enterprise plans.

Is there a free trial?

Yes! All paid plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

What happens after the trial?

You'll be prompted to add payment info. You can also downgrade to our free plan anytime.

Do you offer refunds?

Yes! We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all annual plans. No questions asked.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes, cancel anytime with no penalties. Your access continues until the end of your billing period.

Still have questions?

Our team is here to help you find the perfect plan for your needs.
